problem id: 37ce4280
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00010100 -> 00010000
  01101111 -> 00001101
  10011100 -> 00110010
  10111010 -> 01001010
  01111111 -> 00001101
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10101001 -> 00100110
  01001110 -> 00011001
  01011000 -> 01100001

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 00000111
